name: Alibaba Group

political.s: SAMR (Chinese antitrust) action (2021). CNY 18.23B in fines. CNY 18.23B (~$2.75B) SAMR fine (Apr 2021) — the largest antitrust penalty in Chinese history — for forcing merchants to choose between Tmall and rival platforms ('er xuan yi' exclusivity).

labor.s: KnowTheChain Forced-Labor Benchmark (2023): 5/100 (ICT). Below sector average — gaps in supplier disclosure, worker voice, or grievance remedy.

dei.s: Stanford FMTI Dec2025 foundation-model transparency: 26/100 — bottom-tier; substantial opacity across data, labor, compute, and downstream-use indicators.

privacy.s: USTR 2025 Notorious Markets List: flagged for counterfeit goods via Taobao (operator: Alibaba Group Holding Ltd).

seedNote: Chinese e-commerce — AliExpress, Taobao, Tmall, Lazada

governance.s: Wikidata: owned by SoftBank Group; HQ Binjiang District. (Wikidata Q1359568)
